overview: A modern ladies dress e-commerce showcase with a new-age aesthetic (light pink, light blue, sky, light beige). Features a product gallery with 8-10 sample dresses, individual product detail pages with WhatsApp buy buttons, an About Us page, a Contact page with interactive map, and a beautiful navbar, CTA, sub-footer, and footer.
features: Individual product detail pages with image, price & discount badge
WhatsApp button on each product pre-fills dress details in chat
Interactive map on Contact page with directions
New-age color palette: light pink, light blue, sky, light beige
